data.title: Monolithic Framework
data.description: Instagram uses a monolithic architecture built primarily on Python with Django.

data.title: CDN Utilization
data.description: Content Delivery Networks are utilized to ensure rapid image and video content delivery.

data.title: Database Layer
data.description: Relational database system for managing user data, posts, and interactions.

data.title: Microservices Transition
data.description: Incremental transition towards microservices for isolated functions such as notifications.

data.title: Backend Modernization
data.description: Using GraphQL to enable efficient querying and separation of front-end and backend responsibilities.
